tools.name: 可灵AI
tools.description: 快手搞的视频生成工具，国产里面算顶的。画面质量和运动连贯性都在线。可灵3.0满血版已上线，通过特定渠道可无限免费使用1080p无水印。
tools.description_en: Kuaishou's flagship video generation model. Produces some of the most realistic AI videos. Kling 3.0 full version is now available with unlimited free 1080p watermark-free generation via specific channels.

free_credits.amount: 官方66积分/天；可灵3.0满血版可通过第三方渠道无限免费使用
free_credits.amount_en: Official: 66 credits/day; Kling 3.0 full version available unlimited free via third-party channels

pros_en: 66 free credits every day — no payment required
Produces 5-10 second clips at up to 1080p resolution
Image-to-video mode generates more realistic results than text-only
No VPN needed for users in China
cons_en: Free clips include a watermark (remove with paid plan)
Maximum clip length is 10 seconds on the free tier
Complex camera movements sometimes produce artifacts
Commercial use requires a paid subscription
tips: 拿图片生视频比纯写文字效果好很多
提示词写细一点，把镜头运动说清楚
会员$8/月真心不贵
tips_en: Use image-to-video instead of text-only — the quality jump is significant
Be specific in your prompts: describe camera angle, motion, and scene details
At $8/month, the paid plan removes watermarks and unlocks longer clips
Compare with Hailuo AI (free, no watermark) if watermarks are a dealbreaker

tools.name: 海螺AI
tools.description: MiniMax家的，运动效果做得特别自然，是那种一看就不是AI生成的感觉。注册就送300积分，免费额度在同类里算大方的。
tools.description_en: By MiniMax, natural motion effects that don't look AI-generated. 300 free credits on signup, generous for its category.
tips: 注册先领300积分别浪费
人物走动、转头这类动作效果最好
做短视频素材挺合适的
tips_en: Claim 300 credits on signup
Best for human walking/turning motions
Good for short video content

tools.name: Luma Dream Machine
tools.description: Luma出的，物理效果和光影做得特别逼真，一看就是那种「哦这个很厉害」的感觉。每月30次免费，够你尝鲜了。
tools.description_en: By Luma, realistic physics and lighting. 30 free generations per month, enough to try it out.
tips: 自然风景类的视频效果最好
提示词写好了真的能惊艳
做产品展示demo挺合适
tips_en: Best for nature/landscape videos
Good prompts can be stunning
Good for product demos

tools.name: Runway
tools.description: AI 视频生成领域的先驱，Gen-3 Alpha 模型画质出色。每月125积分免费，够生成几个高质量短视频。专业创作者用得多。
tools.description_en: Pioneer in AI video generation. Gen-3 Alpha model delivers excellent quality. 125 free credits monthly, enough for a few high-quality short clips. Popular among professional creators.
cons: 免费只给一次性的125积分
tips: 免费积分想好了再用，别浪费
Gen-3 Alpha模型效果最好
视频编辑功能也很实用
tips_en: Use free credits wisely
Gen-3 Alpha model is best
Video editing is also useful

tools.name: Pika
tools.description: Pika 的视频生成以创意特效见长，能做各种风格转换和特效。免费额度每天重置，适合做短视频素材和社交媒体内容。
tools.description_en: Pika excels at creative effects and style transfers. Free credits reset daily, good for short video content and social media material.
tips: Pika Effects功能可以玩玩
短提示词效果反而更好
做表情包和短素材很合适
tips_en: Try Pika Effects feature
Shorter prompts work better
Good for memes and short clips

tools.name: Sora
tools.description: OpenAI的视频生成工具，Sora 2已重新上线。通过免费渠道可无限生成1080p无水印视频，效果在同类工具中属于第一梯队。
tools.description_en: OpenAI's video generation tool, Sora 2 is back online. Unlimited free 1080p watermark-free generation available through free channels. Quality is top-tier among similar tools.
cons: 内测10个月错失市场窗口
tips: 已关停，建议转向可灵AI或Hailuo
可灵AI：免费每天66积分，国产首选
Hailuo：免费每天100积分，画质不错
如果需要故事板功能，可以试试Runway
tips_en: Shut down — switch to Kling AI or Hailuo
Kling AI: 66 free credits/day, top Chinese AI video
Hailuo: 100 free credits/day, good quality
For storyboard features, try Runway

tools.name: 小米MiMo Code
tools.description: 小米基于OpenCode魔改的AI编程助手，开源MIT协议。最大的卖点是内置MiMo Auto通道，装完就能用，限时免费1个月，跑的是MiMo-V2.5模型，100万token上下文。实际跑下来编码能力不错，SWE-Bench成绩跟Claude Sonnet 4.6一个水平，但token效率高很多，同样的任务比Claude省40-60%的消耗。亮点是跨会话记忆、语音输入、自动从历史会话提取知识这些。免费期过了就得付费了，Token Plan最便宜的Lite档起步。
tools.description_en: Xiaomi's AI coding agent forked from OpenCode, open-sourced under MIT. The killer feature is the built-in MiMo Auto channel — zero config, free for 1 month, runs MiMo-V2.5 with 1M token context. Coding performance is on par with Claude Sonnet 4.6 on SWE-Bench, but 40-60% more token-efficient. Highlights: cross-session memory, voice input, auto knowledge distillation. After the free period, you need a Token Plan subscription.

free_credits.amount: MiMo Auto通道限时免费1个月（MiMo-V2.5模型，100万上下文）。平台注册送额度40天有效，邀请好友各得$2
free_credits.amount_en: MiMo Auto channel free for 1 month (MiMo-V2.5, 1M context). Platform signup bonus valid 40 days, invite friends for $2 each
free_credits.commercial_use: MIT开源，商用需看具体服务条款
free_credits.commercial_use_en: MIT open source, check service terms for commercial use

pros: 限时免费白嫖1个月，零配置直接用
跨会话持久记忆，不会每次从头开始
语音输入、自动知识提取等独家功能
开源MIT，可以自己接别的模型
pros_en: Coding on par with Claude Sonnet 4.6
Voice input and auto knowledge distillation
cons: 免费只有1个月，过了得掏钱
免费通道只给V2.5，Pro版要付费
Credit消耗倍率高，宣传的16亿Credit实际用起来没那么多
生态刚起步，社区还在建设中
需要小米账号实名认证才能买套餐
cons_en: Free channel only gives V2.5, Pro requires payment
Credit multiplier is high — advertised 1.6B credits sounds more than it is
Real-name auth required for paid plans
tips: 装完选MiMo Auto通道就能白嫖，不用注册API Key
免费期内多用，1个月后要付费
夜间（0:00-8:00北京时间）打8折，省钱党注意
cache命中时token消耗极低，多轮对话比首轮便宜很多
想要更强的V2.5-Pro得买Token Plan
可以导入Claude Code配置无缝切换
tips_en: Select MiMo Auto on first launch to start free, no API key needed
Use it heavily during the free month, it costs money after
Night discount (0:00-8:00 Beijing time) saves 20%
Cache hits are extremely cheap — multi-turn is cheaper than first turn
V2.5-Pro requires a paid Token Plan
Import Claude Code config for seamless switch

tools.name: DeepSeek
tools.description: 深度求索（DeepSeek）出的大模型，国产AI里的性价比之王。V4版本免费用，API价格只有GPT-4o的十分之一。编程和数学能力特别强，在多个评测里和闭源模型打得有来有回。国内能直接用，不用翻墙。
tools.description_en: DeepSeek's flagship model, the cost-performance king of Chinese AI. V4 is free to use, API pricing is 1/10th of GPT-4o. Excellent at coding and math, competitive with closed-source models in benchmarks.
tips: API调用性价比最高
复杂推理任务效果好
可以本地部署
tips_en: Best value for API calls
Great for complex reasoning
Can deploy locally

tools.name: 通义千问
tools.description: 阿里巴巴的大模型系列，从轻量级 0.5B 到旗舰级 235B 全覆盖。Qwen3 系列刚发布，开源模型里的全能选手。免费用，API也便宜。支持多模态（文字、图片、视频、代码），国内用户体验最好。
tools.description_en: Alibaba's model family, from lightweight 0.5B to flagship 235B. Qwen3 series is the all-rounder among open-source models. Free to use, cheap API. Supports multimodal (text, image, video, code).

free_credits.amount: 注册送tokens；Qwen 2.5 Max可免费生成无水印图片和视频
free_credits.amount_en: Free tokens on signup; Qwen 2.5 Max generates watermark-free images and videos for free

cons_en: Reasoning not as good as DeepSeek
features: 多模态支持（文/图/视频/代码）
tips: 新用户额度要尽快用完
阿里云用户有额外福利
适合企业级应用
tips_en: Use new user credits quickly
Extra benefits for Alibaba Cloud users
Good for enterprise

tools.name: 文心一言
tools.description: 百度的旗舰AI助手，国内最早一批做大模型的。文心大模型4.5版本能力不错，深度搜索和文档处理是强项。免费版功能够用，和百度搜索生态深度整合。适合需要中文理解和搜索增强的用户。
tools.description_en: Baidu's flagship AI assistant, one of the earliest Chinese LLM developers. ERNIE 4.5 has strong capabilities, excelling at deep search and document processing. Free tier is sufficient, deeply integrated with Baidu search.
tips: 百度用户有额外福利
适合内容创作
tips_en: Extra benefits for Baidu users
Good for content creation

tools.name: Kimi
tools.description: 月之暗面出品，K2.6 模型主打编码和 Agent 能力。13小时不间断编码、300个子Agent并行作业，SWE-Bench Pro 得分 58.6。免费版每天有额度，够日常对话和轻量编码。
tools.description_en: By Moonshot AI, Kimi K2.6 focuses on coding and agent capabilities. 13-hour non-stop coding, 300 sub-agents in parallel, SWE-Bench Pro score of 58.6. Free tier includes daily credits for chat and light coding tasks.
pros: K2.6 编码能力接近 Claude Sonnet
开源权重，可私有化部署
Agent Swarm 多智能体协同
pros_en: K2.6 coding performance near Claude Sonnet
cons: 免费额度有限，重度使用需付费
复杂推理不如闭源顶级模型
API 按量计费成本不低
cons_en: Free tier limited, heavy use requires payment
Complex reasoning below top closed-source models
API pricing adds up for heavy use
features: 幻灯片/网站/文档/表格生成
tips: 编码任务优先用 K2.6，比 K2 更稳
Agent Swarm 适合批量处理任务
免费额度日常聊天够用，编码省着点
搭配 Claude Code 用 K2.5 做轻量任务
tips_en: Use K2.6 for coding — more stable than K2
Agent Swarm is great for batch tasks
Free credits enough for daily chat, save for coding
Pair K2.5 with Claude Code for lightweight tasks

tools.name: 豆包
tools.description: 字节跳动的AI助手，基础功能免费。近期"豆包收费"登上热搜，部分高级功能开始收费，用户信任度下降。免费版仍有AI生图等功能可用。
tools.description_en: ByteDance's AI assistant. Basic features are free, but recent controversy over charging has eroded user trust. Free tier still includes AI image generation.
cons: 复杂任务不如专业工具
tips: 抖音用户有额外福利
适合日常使用
tips_en: Extra benefits for TikTok users
Good for daily use

tools.name: Codeium
tools.description: 老牌 AI 编程助手，支持 70+ 编程语言，IDE 插件覆盖广。个人版完全免费，无限制使用。企业版有更多功能。
tools.description_en: Established AI coding assistant supporting 70+ languages with broad IDE plugin coverage. Personal tier is completely free with no usage limits. Enterprise tier adds more features.
cons_en: May not be smart enough for large projects
tips: 个人开发者首选
配合Copilot使用效果更好
设置里可以调灵敏度
tips_en: Best for individual developers
Works well alongside Copilot
Adjust sensitivity in settings

tools.name: 通义灵码
tools.description: 阿里巴巴的AI编程助手，深度集成在VS Code和JetBrains里。用的通义千问模型，中文编程体验好。个人免费用，企业版按席位收费。代码补全、Chat对话、代码解释、单测生成都支持。
tools.description_en: Alibaba's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with VS Code and JetBrains. Uses Qwen models, excellent Chinese coding experience. Free for individuals, enterprise by seat.
cons_en: English code not as good as Copilot
tips: 阿里云用户首选
中文注释理解准确
tips_en: Best for Alibaba Cloud users
Accurate Chinese comment understanding

tools.name: CodeBuddy
tools.description: 腾讯出的AI编程助手，和腾讯云生态深度整合。代码补全、Chat对话、代码审查都支持。个人免费用，企业版有更多功能。特别适合用腾讯云的团队。
tools.description_en: Tencent's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with Tencent Cloud. Supports code completion, chat, and code review. Free for individuals, enterprise plans available.
tips: 腾讯云用户首选
新用户额度要尽快用
tips_en: Best for Tencent Cloud users
Use new user credits quickly

tools.name: AtomCode
tools.description: 华为系开源终端AI编程助手，对标Claude Code。CodingPlan限时免费提供GLM-5.1、DeepSeek-V4-Flash、Qwen3全系列等国产顶级大模型，跑在昇腾芯片上，5小时滚动窗口计量，30天有效。
tools.description_en: Huawei-backed open-source terminal AI coding assistant, competing with Claude Code. CodingPlan offers free 30-day access to GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series and more, running on Ascend chips with 5-hour rolling window metering.

free_credits.amount: CodingPlan Pro档限时免费，30天有效
free_credits.amount_en: CodingPlan Pro tier free for 30 days

pros: Pro档限时免费，含GLM-5.1顶级模型
模型阵容豪华，覆盖国内主流开源大模型
无需翻墙，微信扫码登录
昇腾芯片部署，算力成本低
pros_en: Pro tier free with GLM-5.1 top-tier model
Rich model lineup covering top Chinese open-source LLMs
Strong Agent capabilities, not just API wrapper
Ascend chip deployment, low compute cost
cons: 每日免费名额有限，需抢
仅支持AtomCode客户端内使用，不支持第三方API
微信扫码登录，无其他登录方式
cons_en: Limited daily free quotas, need to grab early
WeChat login only, no other login options
features: GLM-5.1开源编码第一（Artificial Analysis评测）
智能Agent循环：自主读取、编辑、运行、检索、验证
8个内置代码工具：符号索引、调用链追踪、引用查找
5小时滚动窗口计量，使用灵活
华为昇腾芯片部署，无需翻墙
features_en: GLM-5.1 #1 open-source coding model (Artificial Analysis benchmark)
Pro tier: GLM-5.1, DeepSeek-V4-Flash, Qwen3 series
Smart Agent loop: auto read, edit, run, search, verify
8 built-in code tools: symbol indexing, call chain tracking
Runs on Huawei Ascend chips, no VPN needed
tips: 早上9点前去抢名额，成功率更高
首次启动欢迎界面可直接选Set up CodingPlan
也可输入/codingplan命令领取
Pro档额度约为Lite的5倍，建议直接领Pro
tips_en: Try before 9 AM for better chances at getting a quota
Welcome screen has direct 'Set up CodingPlan' option
Or use /codingplan command to claim
Pro tier has ~5x Lite quota, recommend claiming Pro directly

tools.name: 腾讯Marvis
tools.description: 腾讯应用宝团队做的操作系统级AI助手，5月21日全量上线。每天送1000万Tokens，底层跑DeepSeek V4和混元大模型。支持Windows、Mac、安卓三端，有隐私模式（本地模型文件零上传）和效率模式（端云协同）两种运行方式。内置8个专项Agent，覆盖文件搜索、系统设置、远程控制、文档处理等场景。
tools.description_en: Operating system-level AI assistant by Tencent's App Store team. Fully launched May 21. 10M free tokens daily, powered by DeepSeek V4 and Hunyuan models. Windows, Mac, Android. Privacy mode (local model, zero upload) and efficiency mode (cloud-edge). 8 built-in agents for file search, system settings, remote control, document processing.
pros: 系统级Agent，能真正操作电脑
cons: iOS版还没上线（预计6月中旬）
腾讯生态绑定，后续可能有变
tips: 装好先选模式：敏感文件多选隐私模式，追求效率选效率模式
手机装Marvis扫码配对，就能远程操控电脑
1000万Tokens够聊5000轮对话，普通用户根本用不完
隐私模式用非敏感文件先测试，确认没问题再处理重要文档
tips_en: Choose mode on setup: Privacy for sensitive files, Efficiency for speed
Install Marvis on phone + scan QR to pair, enables remote PC control
10M tokens = ~5000 conversations, more than enough for daily use
Test privacy mode with non-sensitive files first before processing important docs

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI编程IDE，市场份额31%排名第一。免费Hobby计划不用绑信用卡，Agent请求和Tab补全有限制。Pro版$20/月支持GPT-4o、Claude等前沿模型。
tools.description_en: AI coding IDE, #1 market share at 31%. Free Hobby plan with no credit card required. Pro at $20/mo supports GPT-4o, Claude and more.
pros: 市场份额最大，社区资源最多
pros_en: Largest market share, most community resources
tips: 先用免费版试试再决定是否付费
Agent模式是核心功能
和Windsurf对比试试
tips_en: Try free first before paying
Agent mode is the core feature
Compare with Windsurf

tools.name: Windsurf
tools.description: AI编程IDE，前身是Codeium。免费版$0/月，Light用量。Cascade功能支持多文件同时编辑。Pro版$20/月。
tools.description_en: AI coding IDE, formerly Codeium. Free plan at $0/month with Light usage. Cascade feature for multi-file editing. Pro at $20/mo.
tips: 和Cursor对比试试再选
Cascade是核心卖点
学生有折扣
tips_en: Compare with Cursor before choosing
Cascade is the key feature
Students get discount

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.description: AI搜索引擎，搜索+阅读+总结一次完成。免费版每天有限次Pro搜索，普通搜索不限。Pro版$20/月，无限Pro搜索+文件上传。来源透明度最高。
tools.description_en: AI search engine: search + read + summarize in one step. Free tier with limited daily Pro searches, unlimited basic search. Pro $20/mo. Best source transparency.
pros_en: Free tier enough for daily use
cons: 中文内容索引不如国产工具
cons_en: Chinese content index weaker than local tools
tips: 做研究和写报告首选
Pro搜索用在重要问题上
和Kimi配合使用效果更好
tips_en: Best for research and reports
Save Pro searches for important questions
Use with Kimi for better results

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.description: Google出的AI研究工具，完全免费。每个笔记本最多50个来源，自动生成播客、视频解说、报告。2026年最被低估的免费AI工具。

free_credits.amount: 新用户每模型赠送约100万Token，130+模型均有免费额度
free_credits.amount_en: ~1M free tokens per model for new users, 130+ models with free credits
free_credits.daily_limit: 无每日限制（按额度消耗）
free_credits.reset: 不重置（一次性额度，用完为止）
free_credits.models_en: Qwen3.6-Flash, Qwen-VL-OCR, Tongyi Wanxiang, DeepSeek and 130+ more

tools.paid_from: 免费额度用完后按量付费
pros: 覆盖文本/视觉/图片生成/语音全模态
pros_en: Qwen series, low latency in China
cons: 免费额度不直接显示，要进模型卡片查
cons_en: Free credits not directly visible, check per model
API Key location is hidden deep
features: 所有模型共用一个API Key
features_en: All models share one API key
tips: API Key在模型广场左下角API-KEY里
免费额度要进每个模型卡片的计费概览里看
所有模型地址都是dashscope.aliyuncs.com
切换模型只改model名字，其他不动
支付宝/淘宝账号直接登录，不用重新注册
tips_en: API Key is in Model Square bottom-left corner
Check free credits in each model's billing overview
All models use dashscope.aliyuncs.com endpoint

Login with Alipay/Taobao account directly
